output.summary: Add a darkMode boolean attribute (default: true) to the Archive block to toggle light/dark mode, following the established CardsCarousel/CardsGrid pattern. Fix btn-tertiary hover contrast bug where 'Read More'/'View Resource' buttons become invisible (white on white) when the archive is in light mode and resource/policy cards are hovered.

fileChanges.description: Add darkMode boolean attribute with default true
fileChanges.details: Add `"darkMode": { "type": "boolean", "default": true }` to the attributes object. Update the example to include `"darkMode": true`.

fileChanges.description: Add darkMode toggle to editor UI and make dark mode classes conditional
fileChanges.details: 1. Add `darkMode: boolean` to ArchiveAttributes type. 2. Import `shadow` icon from `@wordpress/icons`, `BlockControls` and `ToolbarButton`/`ToolbarGroup` from WP components. 3. Add BlockControls toolbar button for dark mode toggle (same pattern as CardsCarousel). 4. Change section className from hardcoded `'archive dark bg-transparent! py-gap-8'` to conditional: `cn({ 'archive py-gap-8': true, 'dark bg-transparent!': attributes.darkMode })`. 5. Change the inner wrapper div from hardcoded dark-mode pseudo-element classes to conditional: `cn({ 'container grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5': true, 'relative grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-gap-6 md:before:-inset-x-8 md:before:-inset-y-gap-8': attributes.darkMode })`.

fileChanges.description: Make dark mode classes conditional using $darkMode attribute and add data-dark-mode attribute
fileChanges.details: 1. Change section from `theme_block_props('archive dark bg-transparent! py-gap-8')` to `theme_block_props(class_name(['archive py-gap-8' => true, 'dark bg-transparent!' => $darkMode]))`. 2. Change inner wrapper div from hardcoded dark pseudo-element classes to conditional using `class_name(['container grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5' => true])` for outer container and `class_name(['grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5' => true, 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-gap-6 md:before:-inset-x-8 md:before:-inset-y-gap-8' => $darkMode])` for inner wrapper. 3. Add `data-dark-mode` attribute to section for JS to detect mode (needed for AJAX-loaded content to inherit the correct card styling).

fileChanges.description: Fix btn-tertiary hover contrast and add light mode support for card hover states and UI elements
fileChanges.details: Key changes: 1. **btn-tertiary hover fix (Bug):** The resource/policy card hover transitions the card from bg-charcoal to bg-accent. In dark mode, `dark:hover:text-off-white` on `.btn-tertiary` would make the button text off-white/cream on a neon-green background. The existing `!important` overrides handle this for group-hover, but the btn-tertiary's own `:hover` pseudo-class (`dark:hover:text-off-white`) can still fire. Add `.archive:not(.dark) .card-resource .btn-tertiary, .archive:not(.dark) .card-policy .btn-tertiary { color: var(--color-charcoal); }` for light mode base. Also add `.archive:not(.dark) .card-resource .group:hover .btn-tertiary, .archive:not(.dark) .card-policy .group:hover .btn-tertiary { color: var(--color-charcoal) !important; }` to keep the btn-tertiary charcoal when card turns accent on hover. 2. **Light mode dropdown arrow:** The current select arrow SVG is hardcoded white. Add a `.archive:not(.dark) select` rule with a charcoal-colored arrow SVG. 3. **Light mode vertical dividers (blog):** The `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` divider color should switch to `rgba(31,31,29,0.2)` in light mode for the blog xl layout. 4. **Light mode blog Load More button:** Remove the white-filled override when not in dark mode. 5. **Navigation pagination dark mode overrides:** The `.navigation .page-numbers` and prev/next buttons use hardcoded charcoal backgrounds. Add `.dark .navigation` overrides for white text and appropriate contrast.

fileChanges.description: Add dark-mode-aware classes so card works in both light and dark archive sections
fileChanges.details: The card currently has hardcoded `bg-charcoal` and `border-off-white` assuming dark mode context. For light mode support: Change `bg-charcoal` to `dark:bg-charcoal bg-white` and `border-off-white` to `dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10`. The hover states `group-hover:bg-accent group-hover:border-accent group-hover:text-charcoal` work in both modes since accent is always a bright color with charcoal text. Also the tag pills `bg-accent-lighter border-accent-light text-charcoal` work in both modes. The btn-tertiary already has `group-hover:text-charcoal!` which is correct for both modes.

fileChanges.description: Add dark-mode-aware classes so card works in both light and dark archive sections
fileChanges.details: Same pattern as card-resource.php: Change `bg-charcoal` to `dark:bg-charcoal bg-white` and `border-off-white` to `dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10` on the article element. Hover states remain the same.

fileChanges.description: Verify blog card works in light mode - the card has no background so it inherits from section, which already works
fileChanges.details: The blog card uses `dark:text-white` on the article which is already conditional. The `card-post-cta btn-tertiary` with `group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]!` should work in both modes. No structural changes needed, but verify the accent-color hover is visible against the off-white page background in light mode.

fileChanges.description: Add dark mode overrides for pagination within archive context
fileChanges.details: The pagination `.page-numbers` text and backgrounds are hardcoded for light backgrounds (charcoal backgrounds, charcoal text). Add `.dark .navigation` overrides: 1. `.dark .navigation .nav-links::after` - change bar color from `rgba(31,31,29,0.5)` to `rgba(255,255,255,0.3)`. 2. `.dark .navigation .page-numbers` - white text color. 3. `.dark .navigation .page-numbers.current` - white text. 4. `.dark .navigation :is(.prev,.next)` - white background with charcoal arrow (invert). These overrides ensure pagination is visible in both dark and light archive modes.

attributeChanges.name: darkMode
attributeChanges.description: Toggle dark mode on/off for the archive section. When true, displays charcoal pseudo-element background with white text (existing behavior). When false, displays on the page's off-white background with charcoal text.

designDecisions.question: What should the resource/policy card background be in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: Use `bg-white` with a subtle `border-charcoal/10` border. On hover, transition to `bg-accent` with `text-charcoal` (same accent hover as dark mode). This maintains the card distinction against the off-white page background while keeping the hover behavior consistent.
designDecisions.evidence: CardsGrid items use bg-white in light mode with border styling. Resource/policy cards need distinct backgrounds since they don't have images.

designDecisions.question: Should the team member cards change in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: No changes needed. Team member cards use `bg-accent text-charcoal` which works on both light and dark backgrounds. The accent color card is already high-contrast.
designDecisions.evidence: Card-team-member.php uses bg-accent which is neon-green - visible on both off-white and charcoal backgrounds.

designDecisions.question: Should the testimonial cards change in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: No changes needed. Testimonial cards use `bg-accent text-charcoal` which works on both backgrounds.
designDecisions.evidence: Card-testimonial.php uses bg-accent rounded-3xl which is high-contrast on any background.

designDecisions.question: How should filter dropdowns and form elements look in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: The forms.css global styles handle light mode by default. The Archive.css overrides for the dropdown arrow SVG (currently white) need a light-mode variant with a charcoal stroke. The select elements will pick up the standard charcoal border/text from global form styles when not in dark mode.
designDecisions.evidence: The `.archive select` block in Archive.css overrides the dropdown arrow to white for dark mode. Need a charcoal version for light mode.

designDecisions.question: What is the 'read more button hover becomes white on white' bug?
designDecisions.recommendation: The `.btn-tertiary` component CSS defines `hover:text-charcoal` and `dark:hover:text-off-white`. In the archive's dark mode, when a resource/policy card is hovered, the card background changes from charcoal to accent (neon-green). The btn-tertiary `dark:hover:text-off-white` would make the button text off-white/cream-colored on a neon-green background - not white-on-white literally, but very low contrast cream-on-green. The existing Archive.css `!important` overrides handle the group-hover scenario, but if the user directly hovers the btn-tertiary element itself, the component's own `:hover` pseudo may still fire. Fix by strengthening the Archive.css override specificity to cover direct hover on the btn-tertiary within a group-hovered card. Additionally, when light mode is added, the same issue would occur more visibly: off-white text on a light background. The fix covers both modes.
designDecisions.evidence: btn-tertiary CSS: `dark:hover:text-off-white` (button.css line 63). Archive.css lines 148-161 override for group:hover but not for direct btn-tertiary:hover within an already group-hovered card.

designDecisions.question: Should the dark mode pseudo-element vertical inset values change?
designDecisions.recommendation: No. The existing values (`before:-inset-y-gap-6 md:before:-inset-y-gap-8`) already match the section padding (`py-gap-8`) per the project rule in taktician.md. In light mode, these pseudo-element classes are simply not rendered.
designDecisions.evidence: taktician.md: 'dark mode vertical inset MUST match section vertical padding'

designDecisions.question: Should the Archive.js AJAX behavior change for light/dark mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: No changes needed to Archive.js. The AJAX fetches the full page and extracts the matching archive section. The server will render the correct light/dark classes based on the block attribute, and the AJAX response will include the correct styling. The `data-dark-mode` attribute on the section can be used if JS-level detection is needed in the future, but currently the card partials should handle both modes via CSS classes.
designDecisions.evidence: Archive.js extracts `.archive-results` innerHTML from AJAX response - new cards will have correct classes based on server-rendered PHP.

designDecisions.question: Should the blog post xl-desktop vertical dividers change in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes. The dividers use `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)` which is invisible on light backgrounds. Add `.archive:not(.dark)[data-post-type="post"] .archive-results .grid > *::before` with `rgba(31,31,29,0.2)` background.
designDecisions.evidence: Archive.css lines 70-78 define white translucent dividers for xl blog layout.

cardPartialAnalysis.summary: Five card partials are used across archive variations. Two (resource, policy) need light-mode background changes. Three (post, team-member, testimonial) work in both modes without changes.

cards.currentStyling: No card background (transparent), uses dark:text-white for text. Image with hover scale. Accent-colored CTA on hover.
cards.lightModeChanges: None needed - transparent background inherits from section, dark:text-white is already conditional.
cards.hoverBehavior: Image scales, CTA changes to accent color. Works in both modes.

cards.currentStyling: bg-accent text-charcoal - accent-colored card with dark text.
cards.lightModeChanges: None needed - accent background is high-contrast on both off-white and charcoal.
cards.hoverBehavior: No hover background change. btn-tertiary has text-charcoal! forced.

cards.currentStyling: bg-charcoal border-off-white - dark card for dark section.
cards.lightModeChanges: REQUIRED: Change to conditional `dark:bg-charcoal bg-white dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10`.
cards.hoverBehavior: Card fills with accent color. btn-tertiary forced to charcoal via !important overrides.

cards.currentStyling: bg-charcoal border-off-white - dark card for dark section.

cards.lightModeChanges: None needed - accent background works on any parent.
cards.hoverBehavior: No card hover transition. Video button uses charcoal text.

bugAnalysis.title: Read More button hover becomes white on white
bugAnalysis.rootCause: The `.btn-tertiary` component CSS (button.css) defines `dark:hover:text-off-white` for dark mode hover. In the archive's dark context, when a resource or policy card is hovered via the `.group` parent, the card background transitions from charcoal to accent (neon-green). The Archive.css has `!important` overrides for `.archive .card-resource .group:hover .btn-tertiary` forcing `color: var(--color-charcoal)`, but these only apply when the GROUP is hovered. If the user hovers directly over the btn-tertiary text itself, the component's own `dark:hover:text-off-white` can compete with or override the group-based rule, resulting in off-white/cream text on the neon-green hover background. When light mode is added, a similar issue occurs: `hover:text-charcoal` on btn-tertiary is fine on a white card, but the group-hover transitions the card to accent - the text stays correct. The actual 'white on white' scenario would occur if in light mode the btn-tertiary text were somehow styled white against the off-white page background.
bugAnalysis.fix: Strengthen the Archive.css overrides to also cover `.btn-tertiary:hover` within the card context, not just `.group:hover .btn-tertiary`. Add rules for both `.dark` and non-dark scenarios.

Verify dark mode (default) renders identically to current behavior
Verify light mode removes charcoal pseudo-element background
Verify light mode resource cards: white bg, charcoal/10 border, accent hover
Verify light mode policy cards: white bg, charcoal/10 border, accent hover
Verify light mode blog cards: transparent bg, text readable on off-white
Verify light mode team member cards: accent bg unchanged
Verify light mode testimonial cards: accent bg unchanged
Verify btn-tertiary hover in dark mode: text stays charcoal on accent-hover cards
Verify btn-tertiary hover in light mode: text stays charcoal, no white-on-white
Verify filter dropdowns have correct arrow color in both modes
Verify pagination is visible in both modes
Verify blog xl-desktop vertical dividers in both modes
Verify AJAX filtering works in both modes (load more, pagination, filters)
Verify ThemeHeading text contrast in light mode (heading/description should be charcoal)
Verify Load More button styling in both modes
